Title: Verify Flash activity is displayed upon system startup
Test Steps:
1. Launch the system
2. Observe the Flash activity is displayed

Title: Verify user can register with valid credentials
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser1
- Valid email: testuser1@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button in the Flash activity
2. Enter the valid username, email, and password
3. Click the "Register" button
4. Observe the system redirects to the Login activity
5. Observe the user's registration is saved in the Postgresol database

Title: Verify user can log in with valid credentials
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser1
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. Enter the valid username and password in the Login activity
2. Click the "Login" button
3. Observe the system redirects to the Newsletter activity

Title: Verify user can view newsletters
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Newsletter activity
2. Observe the newsletters are displayed

Title: Verify user can create a new event
Test Data:
- Event title: Test Event 1
- Event description: This is a test event
- Event date: 2023-03-01
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Create event activity
2. Enter the event title, description, and date
3. Click the "Create" button
4. Observe the system redirects to the Join/view event activity for the newly created event

Title: Verify user can join or view an existing event
Preconditions: User has logged in and created an event
Test Data: - Event ID: 1 (the ID of the event created in TC-Create-Event-001)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Join/view event activity for the event with ID 1
2. Observe the event details are displayed

Title: Verify user can view their profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Profile activity
2. Observe the user's profile details are displayed

Title: Verify user can log out
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Logout" button
2. Observe the system redirects to the Flash activity

Title: Verify user receives notifications
Preconditions: User has registered and created an event
Test Steps: 1. Observe if the user receives notifications about new events or newsletters

Title: Verify data is saved and retrieved from the Postgresol database
Preconditions: User has registered and created an event
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve user data and event data from the Postgresol database
2. Observe the data is accurate and complete

Title: Verify system denies access with invalid credentials
Test Data:
- Invalid username: invaliduser
- Invalid password: invalidpassword
Test Steps:
1. Enter the invalid username and password in the Login activity
2. Click the "Login" button
3. Observe the system does not redirect to the Newsletter activity and displays an error message

Title: Verify system denies registration with empty fields
Test Data:
- Empty username
- Empty email
- Empty password
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button in the Flash activity
2. Leave all fields empty
3. Click the "Register" button
4. Observe the system does not redirect to the Login activity and displays an error message

Title: Verify system denies registration with an invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button in the Flash activity
2. Enter a valid username, password, and an invalid email
3. Click the "Register" button
4. Observe the system does not redirect to the Login activity and displays an error message

Title: Verify system denies registration with a password shorter than 4 characters
Test Data:
- Username: testuser1
- Email: testuser1@example.com
- Password: short
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Register" button in the Flash activity
2. Enter a valid username, email, and a short password
3. Click the "Register" button
4. Observe the system does not redirect to the Login activity and displays an error message

Title: Verify system denies event creation with an invalid date format
Test Data:
- Event title: Test Event 1
- Event description: This is a test event
- Event date: 2023-03-01T24:00:00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Create event activity
2. Enter the event title, description, and an invalid date
3. Click the "Create" button
4. Observe the system does not redirect to the Join/view event activity and displays an error message

Title: Verify system denies joining or viewing an event with an invalid event ID
Preconditions: User has logged in and created an event
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Join/view event activity for the event with ID 0
2. Observe the system does not display event details and displays an error message
